---
title: "Iván Weigandi"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: latest-news
    contents:
      - research_files/journals.yml
      - research_files/working_papers.yml
      - research_files/policy.yml
      - research_files/data.yml
      - posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    max-items: 3
    image-align: left
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [date, label, title]
---

::: {.home-hero}
::: {.home-photo-panel}
<div class="photo-wrapper">
![](images/profile.jpg){.home-photo fig-alt="Portrait of Iván Weigandi"}
<div class="photo-overlay">Buenas!</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.home-content}

::: {.lang-en}
I am an Argentinian economist interested in international and macro-financial analysis, credit risk, and policy research. I am currently a Research Fellow in Macroeconomics, Financing, and Global Shocks within the International Economic Development Group at [ODI Global](https://odi.org/en/profile/ivan-weigandi/).

I am part of the Local Currency for Development group, where I have participated in projects such as ["Enhancing MDB Capacity through Local Currency Lending"](https://business.leeds.ac.uk/dir-record/research-projects/2292/enhancing-mdb-capacity-through-local-currency-lending) and ["Currency Risk-Sharing Scheme for Scaling up Local-Currency Climate Finance in Uganda"](https://business.leeds.ac.uk/dir-record/research-projects/2516/currency-risk-sharing-facility-for-scaling-up-local-currency-climate-finance-in-uganda), through research roles at the University of Leeds and City St George's, University of London.

Previously, I worked as a Credit Analyst at Moody's Local Argentina (2019–2022), covering banks, structured finance transactions, and insurance companies. Before that, I was an analyst in the Research and Statistics Department at Argentina's National Insurance Superintendency (2013–2019). I also have several years of experience as an independent economic consultant. I am also a coordinator in the YSI Financial Stability Working Group.
:::
::: {.lang-es}
Soy un economista argentino interesado en macrofinanzas internacionales y macroeconomía, riesgo crediticio y políticas públicas. Actualmente soy Investigador en Macroeconomía, Financiamiento y Shocks Globales dentro del Grupo de Desarrollo Económico Internacional en [ODI Global](https://odi.org/en/profile/ivan-weigandi/).

Formo parte del grupo Local Currency for Development, donde participé en proyectos como ["Enhancing MDB Capacity through Local Currency Lending"](https://business.leeds.ac.uk/dir-record/research-projects/2292/enhancing-mdb-capacity-through-local-currency-lending) y ["Currency Risk-Sharing Scheme for Scaling up Local-Currency Climate Finance in Uganda"](https://business.leeds.ac.uk/dir-record/research-projects/2516/currency-risk-sharing-facility-for-scaling-up-local-currency-climate-finance-in-uganda), a través de roles de investigación en la Universidad de Leeds y City St George's, Universidad de Londres.

Anteriormente, trabajé como Analista de Crédito en Moody's Local Argentina (2019–2022), cubriendo bancos, finanzas estructuradas y aseguradoras. Antes de eso, fui analista en la gerencia de Estudios y Estadísticas de la Superintendencia de Seguros de la Nación (2013–2019). También cuento con varios años de experiencia como consultor económico independiente, y soy coordinador en el Grupo de Trabajo de Estabilidad Financiera de YSI.
:::

## Education

::: {.lang-en}
[PhD in Economics - University of Leeds](https://business.leeds.ac.uk/pgr/1367/ivan-weigandi){.edu-link} - UK - 2026

Master's in Economic Development (Macroeconomics & Development Financing) - Universidad Nacional de General San Martín - Argentina - 2021

B.A. in Economics - Universidad de Buenos Aires - Argentina - 2018
:::
::: {.lang-es}
[Doctorado en Economía - Universidad de Leeds](https://business.leeds.ac.uk/pgr/1367/ivan-weigandi){.edu-link} - Reino Unido - 2026

Maestría en Desarrollo Económico (Macroeconomía y Financiamiento del Desarrollo) - Universidad Nacional de General San Martín - Argentina - 2021

Licenciatura en Economía - Universidad de Buenos Aires - Argentina - 2018
:::


::: {.lang-en}
## News
:::
::: {.lang-es}
## Novedades
:::

::: {#latest-news}
:::

<style>
/* Hide header anchor icons */
h2 .header-anchor,
h2 .anchorjs-link,
h3 .anchorjs-link {
  display: none !important;
}

#listing-latest-news,
#listing-latest-news .quarto-listing-container-default {
  display: block !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

#listing-latest-news .list {
  display: table !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  border-collapse: collapse !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

#listing-latest-news .quarto-post {
  display: table-row !important;
  background-color: transparent !important;
  transform: none !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

#listing-latest-news .body,
#listing-latest-news .metadata {
  display: table-cell !important;
  vertical-align: middle !important;
  padding: 0.15rem 0 !important;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--rule) !important;
}

#listing-latest-news .quarto-post:first-child .body,
#listing-latest-news .quarto-post:first-child .metadata {
  border-top: none !important;
}

#listing-latest-news .quarto-post:hover .body,
#listing-latest-news .quarto-post:hover .metadata {
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4) !important;
}

#listing-latest-news .body {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 1px !important; /* Critical for ellipsis in table-cell */
}

#listing-latest-news .listing-title,
#listing-latest-news .listing-title a {
  font-size: var(--bio-font-size) !important;
  line-height: 1.2 !important;
  font-weight: normal !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  text-overflow: ellipsis !important;
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  display: block !important;
}

#listing-latest-news .metadata {
  width: 1% !important; /* Forces it to shrink-wrap perfectly */
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  padding-left: 1.5rem !important; /* Replaces the flex gap */
}

#listing-latest-news .metadata a {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: row !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: space-between !important;
  gap: 0.5rem !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: inherit;
}

#listing-latest-news .listing-label {
  order: -1 !important; /* Move label to the left of the date */
  font-size: var(--bio-font-size) !important;
  color: var(--blue) !important;
  font-weight: normal !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  width: auto !important; /* Now safe to be auto! */
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  text-align: left !important;
}

#listing-latest-news .listing-date {
  width: 85px !important;
  text-align: right !important;
  font-size: var(--bio-font-size) !important;
  color: var(--muted) !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

#listing-latest-news .listing-subtitle {
  display: none !important;
}
</style>

:::
:::
